Dashboard Archive: 2026-06-26 Home
About This Dashboard
What It Does
Long-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns from 1 month to 10 years, with relative performance vs SPY over 1y/5y/10y. Same scoring engine as the short-term ranker but optimized for longer investment horizons and secular trends.
Today's Reading
ADTTF dominates today's rankings with a score of 95.4 and rank 1, displaying extraordinary long-term momentum with a 10-year return of 10,017.7% and consistent acceleration across all timeframes (the 10y/5y ratio of 12.97 indicates explosive recent acceleration). The asset maintains a clean momentum signal at 0.49 with all four moving averages in bullish alignment, and it has dramatically outperformed SPY by 9,767.85% over 10 years while maintaining very low correlations to major sector indices (highest correlation is only 0.196 to real estate). ATEX appears second but shows a notably different pattern: strong 6-month performance of 298.71% followed by deceleration in longer timeframes (5-year return drops to 50.18%), with a concerning 5-year underperformance versus SPY of -25.52%, suggesting this momentum may be more cyclical and less sustained than ADTTF's secular trend. The data suggests ADTTF represents a rare case of multi-decade outperformance with accelerating returns, while ATEX captures shorter-term momentum that has failed to persist over longer horizons.
For educational and informational purposes only. Not financial advice. Past performance does not guarantee future results.
